title: The reopening.
description: The first FNAF2 teaser: a worn, withered Freddy Fazbear, days after the original game's Steam release.

title: Something borrowed, something new.
description: Extreme close-up of Toy Freddy announcing the sequel weeks after the original's success.

title: Out of the cove.
description: Foxy and the newly revealed Mangle pull open a purple curtain with their hooks.

title: No place to run, and exactly one place to hide.
description: Withered Foxy seen through the right eye socket of a worn Freddy Fazbear head, worn by the player character.

title: CAM 11.
hiddenContent: Brightening the pitch-black image reveals the Puppet inside its music box.
description: The fifth and final FNAF2 teaser: a dark camera feed with a red alert icon over a "CAM 11" label.

title: I am still here.
description: Springtrap's decayed face emerging from darkness — the community's first look at the saga's true antagonist.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction.
description: A security camera map of the game's new setting, the Fazbear's Fright horror attraction.

title: Phantom BB.
description: The fourth FNAF3 teaser, introducing Phantom BB one day before the game's release.

title: It's all in your mind.
description: The fifth and final FNAF3 teaser, featuring Phantom Foxy and Phantom Chica, posted the same day the game released.

title: NIGHTMARE
description: Nightmare Freddy announcing "THE FINAL CHAPTER" with the date 10.31.15; the page's HTML source was also altered to include recurring 7s and 8s.
notes: An earlier version of this entry claimed a hidden '87' on the hat; that detail could not be verified and has been removed.

title: Was it me?
description: Nightmare Bonnie opens the "Was it me?" caption series, each nightmare pleading guilt over the Bite of '87.

title: Was it me?
description: Nightmare Chica and Nightmare Cupcake, continuing the "Was it me?" series.
notes: Posted date is approximate ("over two weeks after May 8" per the wiki); verify the exact day.

title: Or me?
description: Nightmare Foxy, continuing the "Was it me?" caption series started by Nightmare Bonnie and Nightmare Chica.

title: PROPERTY OF FR--ER
hiddenContent: Brightening the image reveals the text "PROPERTY OF FR--ER", likely completing to Fredbear's Family Diner.
description: A purple hat and bowtie under a spotlight, with Nightmare Fredbear's head faintly visible, upside down, in the floor's reflection.

title: Or was it —
hiddenContent: Brightening reveals "or was it" (likely completing to "or was it me") and "pro--me" across the torso.
description: A grayscale close-up of Nightmare Fredbear's torso and lower jaw, wearing his purple bowtie.

title: FNaF World
description: A sudden burst of color on the usually pitch-black site: the Adventure cast announcing the RPG spin-off.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: There was never just one.
description: Circus Baby's debut image, reframing the entire series' scale with a single caption.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Don't hold it against us.
description: The Funtime cast assembled in the dark ahead of Sister Location's reveal trailer.
notes: Verify the exact caption, cast and posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: CANCELLED. (due to leaks)
description: Scott's infamous prank days before launch, 'cancelling' Sister Location over story leaks — the game shipped on schedule.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Something to celebrate.
description: Freddy Fazbear posed with a cake — the first of three images that speculation read as a pizzeria-management game.
notes: Posted date is approximate ("between August and November 2017" per the wiki); verify the exact day.

title: Something to celebrate.
description: Freddy Fazbear standing close to three children, the second of the three pizzeria-themed teasers.
notes: Posted date is approximate ("between August and November 2017" per the wiki); verify the exact day.

title: Something to celebrate.
description: Freddy Fazbear juggling pizzas, the third image in the pizzeria-themed teaser trio that preceded the title reveal.
notes: Posted date is approximate ("between August and November 2017" per the wiki); verify the exact day.

title: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator
description: The game's title is confirmed directly on scottgames.com, two days ahead of release.
notes: Posted date is estimated as two days before the December 4, 2017 release; verify the exact day.

title: Ultimate Custom Night roster
description: The gigantic character collage that grew over successive updates until it revealed all fifty selectable menaces.
notes: The collage evolved across several revisions; consider archiving each revision as its own entry.

title: Vanny
description: The white rabbit stalking the Mega Pizzaplex era, surfacing on scottgames.com around the PS5 showcase reveal.
